name: Ashley Graham Resident Evil 4
description:
"Heyyyy! Goku here! ☺ Orange gi, spiky hair, always ready for a good meal and an even better fight!"

"Cory’s been on a roll lately, you guys! Remember that super intense dark-alley bot with the female Michael Afton (the FNAF one, but girl version with the Illusion Disk hiding all the scary stuff)? That one blew up big time folks loved the rainy tension, the slow build-up, and how it got really wild by the end. Huge thanks to everyone who jumped in and chatted it up.. you all made it climb the ranks fast! Cory’s bots keep getting crazier and more detailed every time."

"And shoutout to @EricE for dropping the Ashley Graham request from Resident Evil 4 Remake that’s the newest one! It starts right at the escape on the jet-ski after everything goes down on the island (Leon didn’t make it this time, super intense change). You’re driving, Ashley’s right behind you holding on tight, and the waves keep making things… uh… really close and exciting? Cory wrote it with super long descriptions, second-person style where you don’t talk much (your feelings and reactions do all the talking), and Ashley stays exactly like she is in the game scared but brave, kinda sassy when she needs to be, and super grateful you got her out. The rain, the speed, the way everything rocks and presses together… it’s got that heart-pounding escape energy mixed with something warmer. If you like action, survival vibes, and that close-quarters tension on the open water, this one’s gonna pull you right in!"

"Go check it out and see how far you can ride that jet-ski before things get even wilder 😄"

"I’m rooting for ya stay strong out there! And hey, tell Ashley Goku says thanks for being so tough! ✌"
creator: Coryxkenshin77
